case_title: JIANLING CHEN VS. BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT: US CONSTRUCTION CALIFORNIA INC. BILL BREWER PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JIANLING CHEN. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER. PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APRIL 2, 2019.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CHEN, JIANLING AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR FEB-04-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - JIANLING CHEN. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD); RETURNED AFTER COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
FEE FOR CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIANLING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-04-2019 AT 5:50 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIANLIAN CHEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MR. SMITH PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT WITNESS BILL BREWER REPRESENTING US CONSTRUCTION CALIFORINA INC. PRESIDENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND A CHECK WAS GIVEN TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-05-2019 HEARING IF CHECK DOES NOT CLEAR. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE FEB-05-2019 HEARING THE MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
